caption: A man wearing a dark baseball cap and a dark shirt is visible in a small video inset in the upper right corner of a computer screen, appearing to present a slideshow. The main display shows a presentation slide titled "Rural Community Food System" with a section labeled "Introduction." The slide asks, "What constitutes a sustainable localized food system for a rural community source as local as possible from locally owned and operated businesses in the community." Other visible text includes "Session Videos," "References," and a diagram containing the phrases "Availability," "Consumption," and "26R Benched system." The man remains in the corner of the screen throughout the sequence, with his facial expression and head position shifting slightly. The presentation slide remains static, and the overall layout of the browser window and its open tabs stays consistent across the frames.
